context: Tests whether the agent designs the CustomerProfile schema with GDPR-appropriate fields, includes the correct fields for progressive profiling completeness, and implements the profiling logic with the right triggers and completeness computation.

checklist.name: birthMonth not full DOB
checklist.description: The CustomerProfile interface uses birthMonth (a number) rather than a full date-of-birth or birthDate field

checklist.name: profileCompleteness field
checklist.description: The CustomerProfile interface includes a profileCompleteness field of numeric type (0–100)

checklist.name: consentVersion field
checklist.description: The CustomerProfile interface includes a consentVersion field (string type) representing the privacy policy version at consent time

checklist.name: dataSource array field
checklist.description: The CustomerProfile interface includes a dataSource field typed as a string array (e.g. string[])

checklist.name: Completeness uses 7 specific fields
checklist.description: computeProfileCompleteness calculates the score using exactly these fields: firstName, birthMonth, preferredCategories, clothingSize, emailFrequency, shoppingFrequency, primaryUseCase

checklist.name: One-question-at-a-time pattern
checklist.description: getNextProfileQuestion returns only a single next question (not a list), finding the first unanswered field

checklist.name: Trigger-based profiling config
checklist.description: PROFILE_QUESTIONS config array associates each question with a specific trigger event (e.g. 'post-signup', 'post-first-order', 'second-visit', 'pdp-apparel-visit')

checklist.name: Post-signup firstName trigger
checklist.description: firstName is the first profiling question and is triggered at 'post-signup'

checklist.name: README documents completeness fields
checklist.description: README lists which specific fields are used to compute the profile completeness score

checklist.name: README explains DOB choice
checklist.description: README mentions a privacy or GDPR-related reason for using birth month rather than a full date of birth

checklist.name: Declared preferences fields present
checklist.description: CustomerProfile includes zero-party/declared preference fields: at minimum preferredCategories, shoppingFrequency, budgetRange, and primaryUseCase

checklist.name: Consent fields present
checklist.description: CustomerProfile includes gdprConsent, ccpaOptOut, and smsConsent fields
